title: Skyblock Classical
description: This modpack brings back a revived version of Skyblock we all remember
body:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98cd9ce93b18a08c916d143d06a88892ba39527c.png)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This modpack is aims to be the original skyblock we remember from 2011 while being lightweight and optimized with mods like Sodium

There will be:

- Updates for pack improvements/bugfixs

- Minecraft Version updates up to 1.21.8

- Heavier pack versions with other mods like Minimaps or Valkrien Skies

  btw, the terrain gen is skyblock, so you dont need a downloaded world
